tax_note: All MRP prices include 18% GST unless noted. Prices marked 'est.' are estimated from USD supplier pricing.

kits.name: Rally Setup
kits.price_note: Gear only, excludes PC and monitors
kits.description: Entry-level complete sim rig targeting casual-to-serious hobbyists. Single-screen setup with rally-focused peripherals including sequential shifter and handbrake. Ideal for rally sim racing with Assetto Corsa, WRC, Dirt Rally.

components.name: QR with Round Rim
components.specs: Quick release + round steering wheel rim

kits.ideal_for: Rally sim racers, hobbyists stepping up from Logitech/Thrustmaster, WRC/Dirt Rally players

kits.name: Entry Kit (with PC)
kits.price_note: Includes sim gear, rig, PC (RTX 5070), and single ultrawide monitor. Price incl. 18% GST.
kits.description: Complete turnkey setup including gaming PC and single ultrawide monitor. 10Nm direct drive wheelbase with carbon formula wheel and 200kg load cell pedals. Ready to race out of the box.
kits.ideal_for: Serious hobbyists wanting a complete turnkey setup, first-time direct drive buyers

kits.name: Mid Kit (with PC)
kits.price_note: Includes sim gear, rig, PC, and single ultrawide monitor. Price incl. 18% GST.
kits.description: Mid-range complete setup with 12Nm direct drive wheelbase, carbon round wheel, and upgraded load cell pedals. Single ultrawide display for immersive racing.
kits.ideal_for: Experienced sim racers wanting better force feedback and pedal feel, GT and formula racing

kits.name: Pro Kit (with PC, Single Screen)
kits.price_note: Includes sim gear, rig, PC, and single ultrawide monitor. Price incl. 18% GST.
kits.description: Professional-grade setup with 18Nm direct drive wheelbase and premium peripherals. Single ultrawide display. Designed for competitive sim racers and professional driver training.

components.name: Pro Load Cell Pedals
components.specs: CCP EVO series, hydraulic load cell

kits.ideal_for: Competitive sim racers, aspiring professional drivers, driver training programs

kits.name: Pro Triple Screen Kit (with PC)
kits.price_note: Includes sim gear, rig, PC, and triple 32" monitors. Price incl. 18% GST.
kits.description: Top-tier non-motion setup with Simagic Alpha wheelbase, SimGrade pedals, and triple 32" 1440p monitors for maximum FOV immersion. The choice for serious competitive sim racers.
kits.ideal_for: Competitive esports racers, professional driver training, premium home setup
kits.space_required: Approx. 2.0m x 1.5m floor space (wider for triple screens)

kits.name: Formula Cockpit with Motion
kits.price_note: Starting from Rs.11L+. Final price depends on configuration. Gear + motion platform, PC separate.
kits.description: The ultimate sim racing experience. Full formula cockpit with 3DOF motion platform using 4x actuators. Designed for racing academies, professional driver training, and B2B entertainment venues. Provides real g-force simulation for braking, acceleration, and cornering.

components.name: Formula Cockpit
components.specs: Full aluminium extrusion cockpit with formula seating

kits.ideal_for: Racing academies, professional driver training, B2B entertainment venues (airports, malls), high-end home setups
kits.space_required: Approx. 2.5m x 2.0m floor space (motion platform requires extra clearance)

kits.name: Araya Airport Simulator (Config 1 - Ultrawide)
kits.price_note: B2B pricing per unit. Fully enclosed commercial simulator.
kits.description: Commercial-grade enclosed airport lounge simulator with 49" ultrawide display. Modular cladding wrap-ready for branding, kiosk mode with auto-reset, remote management, zero staff intervention. Software: Assetto Corsa (commercial licence).
kits.ideal_for: Airport lounges, shopping malls, entertainment venues, brand activation events
kits.space_required: Fully enclosed unit, approx. 2.0m x 1.5m x 2.0m

kits.name: Araya Airport Simulator (Config 2 - Triple Screen)
kits.price_note: B2B pricing per unit. Fully enclosed commercial simulator.
kits.description: Commercial-grade enclosed airport lounge simulator with triple 32" displays and bezel-free kit. Same commercial features as Config 1 but with wider field of view.
kits.ideal_for: Airport lounges, shopping malls, entertainment venues, brand activation events
kits.space_required: Fully enclosed unit, approx. 2.0m x 1.5m x 2.0m

brand_partners.note: 128 SKUs. MOQ 50,000 RMB per order, 250,000 RMB annual.

brand_partners.name: Asetek SimSports
brand_partners.status: NDA signed, pricelist on file (Sep 2024). Scale unclear.

services: Custom PC builds optimized for sim racing
B2B commercial simulator solutions (airports, malls, racing academies)
Sim-to-real driver training consultation (race engineer expertise)
CAN bus telemetry integration (real car data to sim dashboard)
Custom rig configuration and component selection
Maintenance and support for installed setups
Enclosed simulator builds with branded cladding (Araya Airport model)
MoTeC data analysis and telemetry coaching

racesims_own_products.description: Products designed, manufactured, or assembled by RaceSims in-house
items: GT Pro Rig (aluminium extrusion cockpit frame)

manufacturing_details.laser_cut_parts: Mild steel, 1-10mm thickness (foot mount, pedal mount, wheelbase deck, seat brackets, monitor mounts, trays)
manufacturing_details.assembly: Modular bolt-together with M8 T-nuts and corner brackets
manufacturing_details.cad_files: SolidWorks assembly + AutoCAD DXF laser cutting files on file
